黒い.mnemonics: Visualize 'kuroi' as the color of a crow ('kuro') flying in the night sky.

白い.mnemonics: Think of 'shiroi' as the color of snow ('shiro') covering the ground.

赤い.mnemonics: Remember 'akai' as the color of a ripe apple ('aka') hanging from a tree.

青い.mnemonics: Visualize 'aoi' as the color of the sky ('ao') on a clear day.

黄色い.mnemonics: Think of 'kiiroi' as the color of a ripe banana ('kii') in the sunlight.

茶色い.mnemonics: Remember 'chairoi' as the color of tea ('cha') steeped to perfection.

緑.mnemonics: Visualize 'midori' as the color of fresh grass ('midori') after a rain shower.

紫.mnemonics: Think of 'murasaki' as the color of royal robes ('murasaki') worn by kings.

紺色.mnemonics: Remember 'kon'iro' as the color of a deep ocean ('kon') at dusk.

灰色.mnemonics: Visualize 'haiiro' as the color of ash ('hai') from a burnt firewood.

水色.mnemonics: Think of 'mizu'iro' as the color of clear water ('mizu') in a tranquil lake.

金色.mnemonics: Remember 'kiniro' as the color of shimmering gold ('kin') coins.

銀色.mnemonics: Visualize 'gin'iro' as the color of a shiny silver ('gin') spoon.

ピンク.mnemonics: Think of 'pinku' as the color of cherry blossoms ('pinku') in the spring.

オレンジ.mnemonics: Remember 'orenji' as the color of a juicy orange ('orenji') fruit.

ベージュ.mnemonics: Visualize 'beige' as the color of sandy beaches under a bright sun.
